productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Black  Backpack
description: It's all about comfort and style with this backpack from united colors of benetton. The heavily padded laptop holder with a wide velcro closure and sleeve, coupled with the peeping red zipper on the front makes this a great buy.Length: 34 cmWidth: 7.5 cmHeight: 46 cmMade of 100% nylon with a 100% polyester inner lining for durability and easy maintenanceHas one main roomy zippered compartment, with a heavily padded laptop chamber, sleeve, wide velcro closure, two thin organizer pouches and a wide baseOne front zipper to widen the bag and enhance spaceTwo buckled straps on the sides to hold the contents of the main zipper in placeOne front zippered compartment Ergonomically padded back with wide and padded adjustable straps for carrying easeMeshed and padded haul loopConcealed headphone patchBrand badge on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
